channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [WHEELS] Wheels India: Nippon India MF Sells 300,000 Shares
item.description:
Nippon India Mutual Fund, acting through Nippon Life India Trustee Limited, disposed of 300,000 shares of Wheels India Limited via open market transactions. This sale reduced Nippon India Mutual Fund's holding in Wheels India Ltd from 4.2618% to 3.0340% of the total share/voting capital. The transactions occurred between September 29, 2025, and April 29, 2026.

  • Nippon India Mutual Fund sold 300,000 shares of Wheels India Limited.
  • The sale decreased Nippon India Mutual Fund's stake to 3.0340%.
  • The transactions were executed through open market sales.
  • The sales occurred between September 2025 and April 2026.
  • Wheels India's equity share capital remains at ₹24,43,30,120 post-sale.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: WHEELS INDIA LTD. | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [MBECL] McNally Bharat Board Meeting Scheduled for May 28, 2026
item.description:
McNally Bharat Engineering Company Ltd has announced that a meeting of the Board of Directors is scheduled for May 28, 2026, to consider and approve the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The trading window for dealing in the company’s shares has been closed from April 1, 2026, and will remain closed until 48 hours after the results are submitted to the stock exchanges.

  • Board meeting to approve FY26 audited financial results on May 28, 2026.
  • Meeting will cover both standalone and consolidated results.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours post results submission.
  • Notice available on the company website: www.mcnallybharat.com.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MCNALLY BHARAT ENGINEERING COMPANY LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [TARC] TARC: Bandhan MF stake rises to 5.0045% on April 29, 2026
item.description:
Bandhan Mutual Fund, through its schemes, acquired 0.0162% equity shares of TARC Limited on April 29, 2026, increasing its total holding to 5.0045% of the company's paid-up capital/voting rights. The acquisition was made through open market purchases. The disclosure was made under Regulation 29(1) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

  • Bandhan Mutual Fund's stake in TARC Ltd. increased to 5.0045% on April 29, 2026.
  • The acquisition involved 0.0162% of TARC's equity shares.
  • The shares were acquired through open market purchases.
  • The disclosure was made under SEBI's Takeover Regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Tarc Ltd | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [MOBIKWIK] Peak XV Partners Sells 77.49 Lakh Shares in One Mobikwik
item.description:
Peak XV Partners Investments IV sold 77,49,321 equity shares of One Mobikwik Systems Limited between November 24, 2025, and April 28, 2026, through open market transactions. This disposal represents 9.85% of the total share/voting capital before the sale. Following the transactions, Peak XV Partners Investments IV holds zero shares in One Mobikwik Systems Limited.

  • Peak XV Partners Investments IV sold 77,49,321 shares of One Mobikwik.
  • The shares were sold between November 24, 2025, and April 28, 2026.
  • The sale was executed through open market transactions.
  • Prior to the sale, Peak XV held 9.85% of One Mobikwik's share capital.
  • After the sale, Peak XV Partners Investments IV holds no shares.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: One Mobikwik Systems Ltd | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [ARMAN] Arman Holdings: Lalchand Mehta & PAC Shareholding Disclosure
item.description:
Lalchand Mehta & PAC disclosed their shareholding in Arman Holdings Limited under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. Before the sale, Lalchand Moolchand Mehta held 0.11% and Sushila Lalchand Mehta held 0.04% of shares. After the sale, Lalchand Moolchand Mehta holds 1.67% (87378 shares) and Sushila Lalchand Mehta holds 2.90% (151033 shares). The transaction occurred in the open market on April 23, 2026. The equity share capital of Arman Holdings remains at ₹5,21,05,000, comprising 52,10,500 equity shares of face value ₹10 each.

  • Lalchand Mehta & PAC disclosed shareholding under SEBI regulations.
  • Lalchand Moolchand Mehta's holding increased to 1.67% after the sale.
  • Sushila Lalchand Mehta's holding increased to 2.90% after the sale.
  • The transaction was executed in the open market on April 23, 2026.
  • Arman Holdings' equity share capital remains unchanged at ₹5,21,05,000.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Arman Holdings Ltd | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [ARMAN] Arman Holdings: Lalchand Mehta & PAC Sell 2,100 Shares
item.description:
Lalchand Mehta and PAC sold 2,100 equity shares of Arman Holdings Limited, representing 0.04% of the total share capital, as per Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The transaction occurred on April 24, 2026. Post-sale, the total holding of Lalchand Mehta & PAC is 236,311 shares, representing 4.53% of the total share capital.

  • Lalchand Mehta & PAC sold 2,100 shares of Arman Holdings.
  • The sale represents 0.04% of Arman Holdings' total share capital.
  • The transaction was executed on April 24, 2026.
  • Post-sale, Lalchand Mehta & PAC hold 4.53% of Arman Holdings.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Arman Holdings Ltd | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [ARMAN] Arman Holdings: Lalchand Mehta & PAC Sell 5,000 Shares
item.description:
Lalchand Mehta & PAC sold 5,000 equity shares of Arman Holdings Limited, representing 0.10% of the total share/voting capital. Sushila Lalchand Mehta sold the shares on April 27, 2026. Post-sale, Lalchand Moolchand Mehta holds 4.43% and Sushila Lalchand Mehta holds 2.76% of the company. The disclosure was made under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

  • Lalchand Mehta & PAC sold 5,000 shares of Arman Holdings.
  • The sale represents 0.10% of Arman Holdings' total share/voting capital.
  • Sushila Lalchand Mehta executed the sale on April 27, 2026.
  • Post-sale, Lalchand Moolchand Mehta holds 4.43% of the company.
  • Disclosure made under SEBI Takeover Regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Arman Holdings Ltd | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [CANBK] Canara Bank: Management Change - Arun Kumar Mishra Promoted
item.description:
Canara Bank announced the promotion of Shri Arun Kumar Mishra, General Manager, Bengaluru Circle Office, to Chief General Manager, Circle Head of Bengaluru Circle, effective May 1, 2026. Simultaneously, Shri Purshottam Chand, Chief General Manager, Treasury Wing, Mumbai, retired from his position on the same date. Shri Arun Kumar Mishra has been with the bank since March 9, 1998, and holds a B.Sc (Nursing) degree along with certifications in Composite Insurance and JAIIB. He has experience across various levels within the bank.

  • Arun Kumar Mishra promoted to Chief General Manager, Bengaluru Circle.
  • Purshottam Chand retired as Chief General Manager, Treasury Wing, Mumbai.
  • Arun Kumar Mishra has been with Canara Bank since 1998.
  • Mishra holds a B.Sc (Nursing) and certifications in insurance and JAIIB.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CANARA BANK | Category: Management Change

item.title: [GEL] Gautam Exim: Share Subdivision & Capital Increase to ₹13 Cr
item.description:
Gautam Exim Ltd. announced the sub-division of equity shares from ₹10 to ₹5 each and an increase in authorized share capital from ₹5 Crore to ₹13 Crore. These changes were approved by members at an Extra Ordinary General Meeting (EOGM) held on April 30, 2026. The alteration includes consequential changes to Clause V of the Memorandum of Association. The reason for the alteration is to facilitate the sub-division of shares and subsequent issue of bonus shares.

  • Equity shares sub-divided from ₹10 to ₹5 each.
  • Authorized share capital increased from ₹5 Crore to ₹13 Crore.
  • Share subdivision increased share count from 50,00,000 to 1,00,00,000.
  • Post-alteration, authorized capital is ₹13 Cr divided into 2,60,00,000 shares at ₹5 each.
  • Alterations approved at EOGM on April 30, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Gautam Exim Ltd | Category: Corporate Action

item.title: [KRANTI] Kranti Industries Board Meeting on May 8, 2026 to Approve Forfeiture
item.description:
Kranti Industries Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 8, 2026, to consider and approve the forfeiture of application money received from Evolution Capital Advisory Services Private Limited due to the non-exercise of 2,50,000 convertible warrants within the warrant tenure. The trading window will be closed for Directors and Designated Persons from the end of the current quarter until 48 hours after the declaration of financial results.

  • Kranti Industries board to meet on May 8, 2026.
  • Meeting agenda includes approval of application money forfeiture.
  • Forfeiture relates to 2,50,000 unexercised warrants of Evolution Capital.
  • Trading window closed until 48 hours post financial results declaration.
  • Meeting will be held at the company's registered office in Pune.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Kranti Industries Ltd | Category: Board Meeting
